hero.title: Visualize any logic
hero.subtitle: Type an algorithm name and get a Manim animation in seconds.
hero.subtitle_describe: Describe any logic — pseudocode, paper algorithms, custom flows. We'll animate it.
hero.placeholder_name: e.g. bubble sort, dijkstra, binary search tree...
hero.placeholder_describe:
S3FIFO Cache Eviction

Three FIFO queues: Small, Main, Ghost.
1. New items enter Small queue
2. On cache hit in Small → promote to Main
...
hero.describe_hint: First line = title. Ctrl+Enter to submit.
hero.hint: No login required for cached animations
